classes.reasoning: This is a service agreement between a sponsor (Biorce Therapeutics) and a CRO (Quantex Clinical Research) for clinical monitoring, translation, regulatory submission support, and data entry services. It contains contract terms, scope of services, key personnel, financial terms, and regulatory compliance requirements typical of a vendor contract that belongs in the Trial Master File.

summary: This is a service agreement (contract ref BRC-QCR-2023-001, version 3.0) executed on 01 February 2023 between Biorce Therapeutics S.L. (Sponsor) and Quantex Clinical Research S.A. (CRO). The agreement defines the scope of CRO services including clinical monitoring at French and Italian sites, document translation, medical monitoring support, French regulatory submissions, and data entry, with an estimated total cost of EUR 233,200.
references_to: ICH E6(R2) Good Clinical Practice guidelines
content:
SERVICE AGREEMENT FOR CLINICAL RESEARCH ORGANISATION SERVICES

Between:
  BIORCE THERAPEUTICS S.L. ("Sponsor")
  Calle de Serrano 41, 28001 Madrid | NIF: B-87654321
  Represented by: Dr. Rafael Moreno, CEO

AND:
  QUANTEX CLINICAL RESEARCH S.A. ("CRO")
  Av. da Liberdade 110, 1269-046 Lisbon | NIF PT: 509-876-543
  Represented by: Mr. David Figueiredo, CEO

CONTRACT REF: BRC-QCR-2023-001 | EFFECTIVE: 01 February 2023 | VERSION: 3.0 (FINAL)

ARTICLE 1 -- SCOPE OF SERVICES

1.1 The CRO shall provide:
  a) Clinical monitoring at sites FR-01, FR-02, IT-01, IT-02
  b) Translation of study documents (ICF, questionnaires) to French and Italian
  c) Medical monitoring support (1.0 FTE, French-speaking) for FR-01 and FR-02
  d) Regulatory submissions support for French ANSM
  e) Data entry support for IT-01 and IT-02 sites

1.2 NOT included: biostatistics, data management, pharmacovigilance, sites in
Spain, Germany, Netherlands (monitored directly by Sponsor CRAs).

ARTICLE 2 -- KEY PERSONNEL

  Sponsor Study Director:    Elena Vázquez (e.vazquez@biorce.com)
  CRO Project Director:      Sophie Blanchard (s.blanchard@quantex.eu)
  CRO Lead CRA (France):     Pierre Leconte (p.leconte@quantex.eu)
  CRO Lead CRA (Italy):      Giulia Romano (g.romano@quantex.eu)

ARTICLE 3 -- FINANCIAL TERMS

  One-time setup fee:                    EUR  12,500
  Monthly management fee (12 months):   EUR   8,200/month
  Per monitoring visit (France):        EUR   2,100/visit
  Per monitoring visit (Italy):         EUR   1,950/visit
  Translation (ICF + questionnaires):   EUR   4,800 (fixed)
  Medical monitoring (1.0 FTE, 12mo):   EUR  84,000
  Regulatory support (France):          EUR   6,500
  Pass-through expenses (estimated):    EUR  18,000
  ESTIMATED TOTAL (excl. VAT):          EUR 233,200

ARTICLE 4 -- INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All study data, results, and reports generated by the CRO are the exclusive
property of the Sponsor.

ARTICLE 5 -- REGULATORY COMPLIANCE

The CRO shall perform all Services in compliance with:
  - ICH E6(R2) Good Clinical Practice guidelines
  - EU Clinical Trials Regulation 536/2014
  - Applicable national regulations (France, Italy)
  - Sponsor's SOPs, as provided

ARTICLE 6 -- TERM AND TERMINATION

Effective 01 February 2023, estimated completion 31 March 2025.
Either party may terminate for convenience with 60 days written notice.

ARTICLE 7 -- GOVERNING LAW

Laws of Spain. Disputes: ICC arbitration, seat Madrid.

SIGNATURES

For Biorce Therapeutics S.L.:  Dr. Rafael Moreno, CEO  [SIGNATURE]  31 Jan 2023
For Quantex Clinical Research:  Mr. David Figueiredo, CEO  [SIGNATURE]  01 Feb 2023

Exhibits: A=Statement of Work | B=Budget | C=Sponsor SOPs | D=CRO Insurance
CONFIDENTIAL COMMERCIAL DOCUMENT | BRC-QCR-2023-001 v3.0
